meta.title: PDF Viewer – Fast PDF Reader for Android Phones & Tablets
meta.description: Fast PDF viewer for Android phones and tablets with search, bookmarks, read aloud, OCR fallback, night mode, thumbnails, zoom, print, share, and password-protected PDF support.
meta.keywords: PDF Viewer, Android PDF viewer, PDF reader Android, PDF opener, PDF search app, PDF bookmarks, read aloud PDF, OCR PDF reader, PDF viewer for phone, PDF viewer for tablet, night mode PDF, password PDF reader
meta.author: Deepak PK

og.title: PDF Viewer for Android Phones & Tablets
og.description: Open, search, bookmark, listen to, print, and share PDFs on Android phones and tablets with a fast modern PDF reader.

twitter.title: PDF Viewer for Android Phones & Tablets
twitter.description: Fast Android PDF reader with search, bookmarks, read aloud, OCR fallback, night mode, thumbnails, zoom, print, and share.

product.name: PDF Viewer
product.heroTitle: PDF Viewer – Fast PDF Reader for Android Phones & Tablets
product.heroDescription: Open PDF files from your phone, file manager, downloads, email attachments, or shared links. Search, bookmark, zoom, listen with read aloud, use OCR fallback for scanned pages, and continue from where you stopped.

features.title: Features Built for Android PDF Reading

cards.title: Open PDFs Anywhere
bullets: Open PDF files from the app picker
Open PDFs from file managers and external apps
Persist read access for SAF document URIs
Unlock password-protected PDF files

cards.title: Recent Files & Resume
bullets: Recent files library with first-page thumbnails
Search recent files by name
Resume reading from the last page
Restore previous zoom level automatically

cards.title: Smooth Reading Controls
bullets: Smooth PDF page rendering with lazy loading
Nearby-page high-resolution preloading
Pinch-to-zoom and double-tap zoom
Go to any page instantly

cards.title: Powerful PDF Search
bullets: Search text inside PDF documents
View result snippets with highlighted matches
Navigate quickly between search results
Find important content faster in long PDFs

cards.title: Bookmarks & Thumbnails
bullets: Bookmark important PDF pages
View bookmark thumbnails
Use thumbnail strip navigation
Remove recent files with confirmation

cards.title: Read Aloud with OCR
bullets: Listen with play, pause, previous, next, and stop controls
Tap to start reading from a selected word or sentence
Adjust speech rate, pitch, and voice
Use OCR fallback for scanned or image-only pages

cards.title: Comfort Reading Tools
bullets: Night mode for low-light reading
Margin crop for cleaner page viewing
Header, footer, and page number skipping during read aloud
Simple multi-column reading order detection

cards.title: Share, Print & Subscriptions
bullets: Share PDF files from the app
Print PDF files when supported by your device
Free preview experience with subscription unlock
Offline subscription cache with grace period

items.title: Students & Learners
items.text: Read notes, books, assignments, and study material with search, bookmarks, thumbnails, and read aloud support.

items.title: Professionals
items.text: Review reports, invoices, forms, manuals, and office documents with fast navigation and resume reading.

items.title: Everyday Readers
items.text: Open personal PDFs, eBooks, manuals, and downloaded documents in a clean, comfortable reader.

items.title: Hands-Free Reading
items.text: Use read aloud, voice controls, and OCR fallback to listen to supported PDFs and scanned pages.

items.q: How do I open PDF files in PDF Viewer?
items.a: You can open PDF files from the app picker, file managers, downloads, email attachments, shared links, and other external apps.

items.q: Does the app remember where I stopped reading?
items.a: Yes. PDF Viewer can restore your recent files, reading progress, last page, and zoom level.

items.q: Can I search inside PDF files?
items.a: Yes. The app supports in-document text search with result snippets, highlighted matches, and quick result navigation.

items.q: Does read aloud work with scanned PDFs?
items.a: Read aloud works best with PDFs that contain selectable text. For scanned or image-only pages, OCR fallback helps detect text when supported.
Yes. PDF Viewer supports unlocking password-protected PDF files.
PDF Viewer includes a free preview experience. Subscription options are available to unlock full-document viewing and extended reading access.

steps.title: Install PDF Viewer
steps.text: Download PDF Viewer on your Android phone or tablet.

steps.title: Open a PDF
steps.text: Choose a PDF from the app picker, file manager, downloads, email attachments, or shared links.

steps.title: Read, Search, Bookmark, or Listen
steps.text: Use zoom, thumbnails, bookmarks, page jump, search, night mode, and read aloud to work with your document.

cards.title: Fast & Modern
bullets: Fast PDF opening and smooth rendering
Lazy loading with high-resolution nearby-page preloading

cards.title: Find Content Quickly
bullets: Text search with highlighted snippets
Go to page, thumbnails, and bookmark navigation

cards.title: Listen to PDFs
bullets: Read aloud controls with voice customization
OCR fallback for scanned or image-only pages
